title: armeria plantaginea var. atlantica
intro: Armeria plantaginea var. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic thrift, is a flowering plant species in the primrose family, distinguished by its pink to purple flowers and woolly leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Armeria plantaginea var. atlantica include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
